description: Postcode-month mean unleaded price (¢/L), restricted to the SC analysis sample (donor pool + treated 5 km rings). Outcome variable for the synthetic-control analysis.
Per-station haversine distance (km) to the nearest of the 10 Costco fuel stations.
Count of stations classified as treated (within 5 km of one of the 4 treated Costcos)
Count of stations classified as donor-eligible (>20 km from every Costco)
Count of stations classified as excluded (5–20 km donut around any Costco)
